title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
company: Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners family as a Risk Analyst in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners!
